name: DRC-01 GST Demand / Show Cause Notice Analysis
description: Extracts key data from GST DRC-01 show cause notices for drafting a formal reply.

checks.focus: Extract GSTIN, legal name, and the section under which SCN is issued
checks.rule: Identify GSTIN, legal name, and the specific section of CGST/SGST Act under which the show cause notice has been issued (e.g., Section 73 or Section 74).

checks.focus: Extract demand amount breakdown — tax, interest, penalty
checks.rule: Identify the total demand amount and its breakdown into tax, interest, and penalty components. Extract exact figures for CGST, SGST, IGST if available.

checks.focus: Identify the grounds/allegations in the SCN
checks.rule: List all specific grounds or allegations on which the demand has been raised — wrong availment of ITC, suppression of turnover, etc.
Identify all tax periods (months/quarters/years) covered by this show cause notice.

checks.focus: Extract response deadline and hearing date
checks.rule: Identify the deadline for written reply and any personal hearing date mentioned in the notice.
